title: agropyron pungens var. athericum
intro: Agropyron pungens var. athericum, also known as a type of grass, is a lesser-known plant that is sometimes referred to as False Wheat Grass or Atherica. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Agropyron pungens var. athericum is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
